response.overview: When a man is sentenced to death for rape and hailed as justice served, the world moves on satisfied. But on the eve of his execution, a final meeting with his lawyer shatters that certainty. He may be innocent.  Refusing to let the truth die with him, the lawyer reopens the case and what begins as a single thread quickly unravels into something far darker. Behind the crime, the conviction, and a suspicious suicide lies a carefully concealed conspiracy. The deeper the investigation goes, the more dangerous the question becomes: Who is really guilty?
response.title: Dark Face
